scripts.predev: pg_isready -q -h localhost 2>/dev/null || brew services start postgresql@16
scripts.db:reset: dropdb --if-exists vurl && createdb vurl && bun run db:migrate:dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: [ -n "$DATABASE_URL_PROD" ] || { echo 'DATABASE_URL_PROD is not set (root .env)'; exit 1; }; DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_PROD" bun run --cwd apps/web db:migrate
